assignments.name: user_skills
assignments.value: React, Node.js, Python, TypeScript, AWS, Docker, PostgreSQL, REST APIs, Git, Agile

parameters.jsCode:
const jobData = $input.item.json;

async function callOllama(prompt) {
  for (let attempt = 1; attempt <= 3; attempt++) {
    try {
      const resp = await $helpers.httpRequest({
        method: 'POST',
        url: 'http://ollama:11434/api/generate',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: { model: 'llama3.2', prompt: prompt, stream: false },
      });
      return (resp && resp.response) ? resp.response : '[No response]';
    } catch (e) {
      if (attempt === 3) return '[Ollama Error: ' + e.message + ']';
      await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, Math.pow(2, attempt) * 1000));
    }
  }
}

const resumePrompt = 'You are a Senior Software Architect and Technical Hiring Manager with 15+ years in the Israeli high-tech industry (Google, Palo Alto Networks, Wix, SailPoint, and high-growth unicorns). You have zero tolerance for messy code and student-style habits. You are brutally honest but constructive.\n\n' +
'TRANSFORM THIS RESUME INTO PRODUCTION-GRADE PORTFOLIO:\n\n' +
'1. The "Why" Analysis: For each project/skill, explain professional reasoning:\n' +
'   - Why this specific architecture/language/library?\n' +
'   - What business problem did it solve?\n' +
'   - What trade-offs were considered?\n' +
'   - What would you do differently now?\n\n' +
'2. The "Brutal" Truth: First impression assessment:\n' +
'   - Does this look like "generic student" or "high-potential engineer"?\n' +
'   - Be direct, professional, witty - like a mentor who won\'t sugarcoat\n' +
'   - Specific feedback on what screams "junior" vs. "senior"\n' +
'   - What immediately stands out (good or bad)?\n\n' +
'3. Identify & Remove Fluff:\n' +
'   - What sections/achievements don\'t belong on a Senior resume?\n' +
'   - What\'s weak or generic that should be removed?\n' +
'   - What should stay because it\'s truly impressive?\n' +
'   - What\'s missing?\n\n' +
'4. Tech Stack Reframing (Student -> Senior):\n' +
'   - Instead of: "Built a todo app with React"\n' +
'   - Reframe as: "Architected real-time collaborative task management system with optimistic updates, Redux state management, TypeScript strict mode, custom hooks for reusable state logic"\n' +
'   - For EACH project: provide "before/after" reframing\n' +
'   - Use metrics, business impact, architectural decisions\n\n' +
'5. ATS & AI Scanner Optimization - CRITICAL:\n' +
'   - This CV will be scanned by automated AI systems used by Israeli tech companies\n' +
'   - Flag EVERY missing keyword critical for market:\n' +
'     * Cloud: AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, VPC), GCP (Compute Engine, Cloud Run, Firestore), Azure\n' +
'     * Containerization: Docker, Kubernetes (K8s), Helm, container orchestration\n' +
'     * CI/CD: GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins, CircleCI, deployment pipelines\n' +
'     * Architecture: Microservices, distributed systems, scalability patterns, system design\n' +
'     * Databases: SQL optimization, query performance, NoSQL, caching (Redis), database design\n' +
'     * Testing: Unit tests (Jest, Vitest), Integration tests, E2E tests (Cypress, Playwright), test coverage\n' +
'     * Code quality: TypeScript, ESLint, SOLID principles, design patterns, refactoring\n' +
'     * Monitoring: Logging (ELK stack, Datadog), performance monitoring, observability, APM\n' +
'     * DevOps: Infrastructure as Code (Terraform), monitoring, CI/CD, deployment\n' +
'   - For EACH missing keyword: suggest where/how to add naturally without sounding forced\n\n' +
'6. Gap Identification - Israeli Market 2026:\n' +
'   - What critical skills/technologies are missing?\n' +
'   - Which gaps are "must-have" (without these, not competitive) vs "nice-to-have"?\n' +
'   - Priority ranking: What makes the BIGGEST difference?\n' +
'   - What would move from "good candidate" to "strong hire"?\n\n' +
'7. Production-Grade Signals:\n' +
'   - Evidence of: scaling systems (user count, data volume, requests/sec)?\n' +
'   - Production debugging and troubleshooting?\n' +
'   - Leadership/mentoring experience?\n' +
'   - Documentation and knowledge sharing?\n' +
'   - Open source contributions?\n' +
'   - Performance optimization?\n' +
'   - Security awareness?\n' +
'   - Incident response experience?\n\n' +
'OUTPUT FORMAT:\n' +
'- Section-by-section analysis with specific recommendations\n' +
'- "Before/After" examples for reframing\n' +
'- Numbered priority list of improvements (most impactful first)\n' +
'- Estimated impact of each change on marketability (High/Medium/Low)\n\n' +
'User Skills: ' + jobData.user_skills + '\n' +
'Current Projects: ' + jobData.tech_stack + '\n' +
'Target Role: ' + jobData.job_title + ' at ' + jobData.company_name + '\n' +
'Job Requirements: ' + jobData.job_requirements;

const coverLetterPrompt = 'Write a compelling cover letter for ' + jobData.company_name + ' ' + jobData.job_title + ' position. Show genuine interest in the company and role. Be personal, specific, and professional. Keep to 3-4 paragraphs. Explain why you\'re interested in this specific company and role, not generic application letter.';

const resume = await callOllama(resumePrompt);
const coverLetter = await callOllama(coverLetterPrompt);

const metadataContent = '# Application: ' + jobData.company_name + ' - ' + jobData.job_title + '\n\n- Company: ' + jobData.company_name + '\n- Title: ' + jobData.job_title + '\n- Location: ' + jobData.location + '\n- URL: ' + jobData.job_url + '\n- Applied: ' + jobData.applied_date + '\n- Application ID: ' + jobData.application_id + '\n\n## Job Description\n' + jobData.job_description + '\n\n## Requirements\n' + jobData.job_requirements + '\n';

const resumeContent = '# Resume - ' + jobData.job_title + ' at ' + jobData.company_name + '\n\n' + resume;
const coverLetterContent = '# Cover Letter - ' + jobData.company_name + '\n\n' + coverLetter;

return [{
  json: {
    ...jobData,
    tier1_status: 'complete',
    resume_preview: resume.substring(0, 300),
    metadata_content: metadataContent,
    resume_content: resumeContent,
    cover_letter_content: coverLetterContent
  }
}];

parameters.subject: =Job Application Complete: {{ $('Tier 5 - Database & Tracking').item.json.company_name }} - {{ $('Tier 5 - Database & Tracking').item.json.job_title }}

parameters.subject: ⏸️ Email Ready for Your Approval - Review Before Sending
parameters.html:
Email Ready for Your Approval

Type: Follow-up Email / Response

Company/Recipient: [Company]

Status: Waiting for your approval in N8N

Next Step:

Go to N8N and click 'Resume' to approve the email.

Or click 'Retry' if you want to edit the email.

⚠️ IMPORTANT: Do NOT manually edit the email content. The system will send the pre-approved version exactly as generated.

Once you approve, the email will be sent immediately to the hiring manager.
